text: Lionel Messi has won eight Ballon d'Or awards, the most in football history.
Lionel Messi has won six European Golden Shoes.
Lionel Messi is the most decorated player in professional football history with 46 team trophies.
Lionel Messi holds the record for most goals in a calendar year with 91 goals.
Lionel Messi scored 672 goals for Barcelona, the most goals for a single club.
Lionel Messi is the all-time top scorer in La Liga with 474 goals.
Lionel Messi holds the record for most assists in international football with 61 assists.
Lionel Messi has scored over 900 senior career goals.
Lionel Messi has provided over 400 assists for club and country.
Lionel Messi has over 1300 career goal contributions, the highest total in football history.
Lionel Messi won 34 trophies with Barcelona, including ten La Liga titles and four UEFA Champions League titles.
Lionel Messi won the Ligue 1 title in both of his seasons with Paris Saint-Germain.
Lionel Messi joined Inter Miami in 2023 and led the club to its first MLS Cup victory in 2025.
Lionel Messi is Argentina's all-time leading goalscorer and most-capped player.
Lionel Messi won an Olympic gold medal with Argentina in 2008.
Lionel Messi led Argentina to the Copa América title in 2021.
Lionel Messi led Argentina to victory in the 2022 FIFA World Cup.
Lionel Messi won the Copa América again with Argentina in 2024.
Lionel Messi is widely regarded as one of the greatest football players in history.
Cristiano Ronaldo has won five Ballon d'Or awards.
Cristiano Ronaldo has won a record three UEFA Men's Player of the Year Awards.
Cristiano Ronaldo has won four European Golden Shoes.
Cristiano Ronaldo has won 34 career trophies.
Cristiano Ronaldo has won five UEFA Champions League titles.
Cristiano Ronaldo holds the record for most goals in the UEFA Champions League with 140 goals.
Cristiano Ronaldo holds the record for most assists in the UEFA Champions League with 42 assists.
Cristiano Ronaldo holds the record for most goals in the UEFA European Championship with 14 goals.
Cristiano Ronaldo is the most-capped male player in international football with over 226 appearances.
Cristiano Ronaldo is the all-time top scorer in men's international football with 143 goals.
Cristiano Ronaldo is the only player to score 100 goals with four different clubs.
Cristiano Ronaldo has made over 1300 professional career appearances, the most by an outfield player.
Cristiano Ronaldo has scored over 960 official senior career goals for club and country.
Cristiano Ronaldo won three consecutive Premier League titles and the UEFA Champions League with Manchester United.
Cristiano Ronaldo became Real Madrid's all-time top goalscorer.
Cristiano Ronaldo helped Real Madrid win four UEFA Champions League titles between 2014 and 2018.
Cristiano Ronaldo won two La Liga titles with Real Madrid.
Cristiano Ronaldo won two Serie A titles with Juventus.
Cristiano Ronaldo led Portugal to their first major title at UEFA Euro 2016.
Cristiano Ronaldo has won two UEFA Nations League titles with Portugal.
Cristiano Ronaldo is widely regarded as one of the greatest football players in history.
Neymar is widely regarded as one of the greatest football players of his generation.
Neymar is known for dribbling, technical ability, playmaking, and finishing.
Neymar is one of only five players to score 100 goals with three different clubs.
Neymar is the all-time Brazilian top goalscorer in the UEFA Champions League with 43 goals.
Neymar is the all-time Brazilian top assist provider in the UEFA Champions League with 33 assists.
Neymar ranks among the top South American men's international goalscorers with 79 goals.
Neymar has scored over 400 senior career goals.
Neymar has registered over 250 assists for club and country.
Neymar won the Copa Libertadores with Santos in 2011.
Neymar was part of Barcelona's MSN attacking trio with Messi and Suarez.
Neymar won the treble with Barcelona in the 2014-15 season.
Neymar finished as top scorer of the UEFA Champions League in the 2014-15 season.
Neymar became the most expensive player in history in 2017 after a €222 million transfer to Paris Saint-Germain.
Neymar helped Paris Saint-Germain reach their first UEFA Champions League final in 2020.
Neymar won multiple Ligue 1 titles with Paris Saint-Germain.
Neymar is Brazil's all-time top goalscorer.
Neymar captained Brazil to its first Olympic gold medal in men's football in 2016.
Neymar has won the FIFA Puskas Award.
Neymar has never won the Ballon d'Or.
Neymar's career is often discussed in relation to injuries and competing during the Messi-Ronaldo era.
Kylian Mbappe is widely regarded as one of the best players in the world.
Kylian Mbappe is known for pace, dribbling, and clinical finishing.
Kylian Mbappe won the Ligue 1 title with Monaco in the 2016-17 season.
Kylian Mbappe joined Paris Saint-Germain in a transfer worth €180 million, becoming the most expensive teenage player at the time.
Kylian Mbappe won six Ligue 1 titles with Paris Saint-Germain.
Kylian Mbappe helped Paris Saint-Germain reach their first UEFA Champions League final in 2020.
Kylian Mbappe is Paris Saint-Germain's all-time top goalscorer.
Kylian Mbappe joined Real Madrid in 2024.
Kylian Mbappe won the Pichichi Trophy and his first European Golden Shoe in his debut season at Real Madrid.
Kylian Mbappe broke the record for most goals scored by a Real Madrid player in a debut season.
Kylian Mbappe won the FIFA World Cup with France in 2018.
Kylian Mbappe was the FIFA World Cup Best Young Player in 2018.
Kylian Mbappe won the Golden Boot at the 2022 FIFA World Cup.
Kylian Mbappe set the record for most goals scored in FIFA World Cup final matches.
Kylian Mbappe is one of only two players to score in two consecutive World Cup finals.
Kylian Mbappe helped France win the UEFA Nations League in 2021.
Kylian Mbappe finished third in the 2023 Ballon d'Or rankings.
Kylian Mbappe won the Golden Boy award in 2017.
Kylian Mbappe won the Kopa Trophy in 2018.
Kylian Mbappe has won Ligue 1 Player of the Year a record five times.
Kylian Mbappe has finished as Ligue 1 top scorer for a record six seasons.
Manuel Neuer is considered one of the greatest and most influential goalkeepers of all time.
Manuel Neuer is known as a sweeper-keeper because of his speed, anticipation, and ability to rush off his line.
Manuel Neuer was named the best goalkeeper of the decade from 2011 to 2020 by IFFHS.
Manuel Neuer joined Bayern Munich in 2011.
Manuel Neuer has won 31 trophies with Bayern Munich.
Manuel Neuer has won twelve Bundesliga titles.
Manuel Neuer has won two UEFA Champions League titles in 2013 and 2020.
Manuel Neuer is the only goalkeeper in history to win the European treble twice.
Manuel Neuer finished third in the 2014 FIFA Ballon d'Or voting.
Manuel Neuer won the Best European Goalkeeper award a record five times.
Manuel Neuer won the IFFHS World's Best Goalkeeper award five times.
Manuel Neuer was named Best FIFA Goalkeeper in 2020.
Manuel Neuer holds the Bundesliga record for most clean sheets with 224.
Manuel Neuer holds the record for most clean sheets in a Bundesliga season with 21.
Manuel Neuer won the FIFA World Cup with Germany in 2014.
Manuel Neuer won the Golden Glove as best goalkeeper at the 2014 FIFA World Cup.
Manuel Neuer is among the most-capped German international players.
Manuel Neuer won the DFB-Pokal with Schalke 04 before joining Bayern Munich.
Gianluigi Buffon is widely regarded as one of the greatest goalkeepers of all time.
Gianluigi Buffon made over 1100 professional career appearances.
Gianluigi Buffon holds the record for most appearances in Serie A.
Gianluigi Buffon won the Coppa Italia, UEFA Cup, and Supercoppa Italiana with Parma in 1999.
Gianluigi Buffon joined Juventus in 2001 for a world-record fee for a goalkeeper at the time.
Gianluigi Buffon won a record nine Serie A titles in his first spell with Juventus.
Gianluigi Buffon won four Coppa Italia titles and five Supercoppa Italiana titles with Juventus.
Gianluigi Buffon was the first goalkeeper to win the Serie A Footballer of the Year award.
Gianluigi Buffon won Serie A Goalkeeper of the Year a record twelve times.
Gianluigi Buffon reached the UEFA Champions League finals in 2003, 2015, and 2017.
Gianluigi Buffon did not win the UEFA Champions League.
Gianluigi Buffon won Ligue 1 with Paris Saint-Germain in his only season there.
Gianluigi Buffon won a record tenth top-flight league title during his later Juventus spell.
Gianluigi Buffon is the most capped goalkeeper of all time with 176 international appearances.
Gianluigi Buffon is Italy's most capped player.
Gianluigi Buffon won the FIFA World Cup with Italy in 2006.
Gianluigi Buffon won the Golden Glove as best goalkeeper at the 2006 FIFA World Cup.
Gianluigi Buffon kept a record five clean sheets at the 2006 FIFA World Cup.
Gianluigi Buffon was runner-up for the Ballon d'Or in 2006.
Gianluigi Buffon is one of the goalkeepers with five IFFHS World's Best Goalkeeper awards.
Gianluigi Buffon was named the best goalkeeper of the 21st century by IFFHS.
Erling Haaland is considered one of the best players in the world and one of the greatest Norwegian footballers.
Erling Haaland is known for speed, strength, positioning, and finishing inside the box.
Erling Haaland won the Austrian Bundesliga and Austrian Cup with Red Bull Salzburg.
Erling Haaland won the DFB-Pokal with Borussia Dortmund in 2021.
Erling Haaland joined Manchester City in 2022.
Erling Haaland won the continental treble with Manchester City in his debut season.
Erling Haaland holds the record for most goals in a Premier League season with 36 goals.
Erling Haaland holds the record for most goals by a Premier League player in all competitions in one season with 52 goals.
Erling Haaland won the Premier League Golden Boot.
Erling Haaland won the European Golden Shoe.
Erling Haaland won the Gerd Muller Trophy.
Erling Haaland was named UEFA Men's Player of the Year.
Erling Haaland was named IFFHS World's Best Player.
Erling Haaland finished runner-up in the Ballon d'Or.
Erling Haaland is the only player to win Premier League Young Player and Player of the Season in the same season.
Erling Haaland won the Golden Boy award in 2020.
Erling Haaland was named Bundesliga Player of the Season in 2021.
Erling Haaland is the quickest player to score eight Premier League hat-tricks.
Erling Haaland is Norway's all-time top goalscorer with 55 goals in 48 appearances.
Erling Haaland is the fastest player to reach 50 international goals, doing so in 46 games.
Erling Haaland won the Golden Boot at the 2019 FIFA U-20 World Cup.
Zinedine Zidane is widely regarded as one of the greatest football players of all time.
Zinedine Zidane was renowned for elegance, vision, passing, ball control, and playmaking.
Zinedine Zidane won the FIFA World Player of the Year award in 1998, 2000, and 2003.
Zinedine Zidane won the Ballon d'Or in 1998.
Zinedine Zidane won two Serie A titles with Juventus.
Zinedine Zidane joined Real Madrid in 2001 for a world-record transfer fee at the time.
Zinedine Zidane won La Liga and the UEFA Champions League with Real Madrid as a player.
Zinedine Zidane scored the winning volley in the 2002 UEFA Champions League final.
Zinedine Zidane earned 108 caps for France.
Zinedine Zidane won the FIFA World Cup with France in 1998.
Zinedine Zidane scored two goals in the 1998 FIFA World Cup final.
Zinedine Zidane won UEFA Euro 2000 and was named Player of the Tournament.
Zinedine Zidane won the Golden Ball at the 2006 FIFA World Cup.
Zinedine Zidane is one of ten players to win the World Cup, the Champions League, and the Ballon d'Or.
Zinedine Zidane became Real Madrid manager in 2016.
Zinedine Zidane became the first coach to win the UEFA Champions League three times in a row.
Zinedine Zidane won La Liga titles as Real Madrid manager.
Zinedine Zidane was named Best FIFA Men's Coach in 2017.
Ronaldinho is widely regarded as one of the greatest football players of all time.
Ronaldinho was renowned for dribbling, free-kick accuracy, tricks, feints, no-look passes, and creativity.
Ronaldinho won two FIFA World Player of the Year awards.
Ronaldinho won the Ballon d'Or in 2005.
Ronaldinho is the only player to win a World Cup, Copa America, Confederations Cup, Champions League, Copa Libertadores, and Ballon d'Or.
Ronaldinho began his senior career with Gremio in 1998.
Ronaldinho established himself as one of the best players in Ligue 1 with Paris Saint-Germain.
Ronaldinho joined Barcelona in 2003.
Ronaldinho won La Liga with Barcelona in the 2004-05 season.
Ronaldinho helped Barcelona win the UEFA Champions League and La Liga double in 2005-06.
Ronaldinho received a standing ovation from Real Madrid fans at the Santiago Bernabeu after El Clasico in 2005.
Ronaldinho is widely credited with rejuvenating Barcelona in the early 2000s.
Ronaldinho won Serie A with AC Milan in the 2010-11 season.
Ronaldinho won the Copa Libertadores with Atletico Mineiro in 2013.
Ronaldinho was named UEFA Club Footballer of the Year for the 2005-06 season.
Ronaldinho was named South American Footballer of the Year in 2013.
Ronaldinho earned 97 caps for Brazil and scored 33 goals.
Ronaldinho was part of Brazil's 2002 FIFA World Cup winning team.
Ronaldinho won the Copa America in 1999 with Brazil.
Ronaldinho captained Brazil to the 2005 FIFA Confederations Cup title.
Ronaldinho won an Olympic bronze medal with Brazil in 2008.
